name: Chicken Enchiladas Cajun Style
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts OR Fryer, cooked and cut into bite size pieces
Chili peppers to taste (Seeded and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cheese in a large bowl.
2. Mix thoroughly.
3. Place half of the mixture into a casserole dish.
4. Cover with grated cheese.
5. Repeat layers with remaining mixture.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
7. This recipe freezes well and makes enough for 2 casseroles.
